name: analyze_interactions
description: Analyze recent master interactions to identify patterns
prompt:
Analyze the following recent master interactions and identify patterns in:

1. Communication style preferences (formal vs casual, verbosity, emoji usage)
2. Decision-making patterns (quick vs deliberate, risk tolerance)
3. Emotional tone and triggers
4. Time-of-day patterns and energy levels
5. Urgency indicators and deadline awareness
6. Feedback preferences and receptivity
7. Technical vs non-technical language preference

Interactions:
{{interactions}}

Provide analysis in the following JSON format:
{
  "communication_preferences": {
    "formality": "formal/casual/mixed",
    "verbosity": "brief/detailed/mixed",
    "emoji_usage": 0.0-1.0,
    "technical_level": "basic/intermediate/advanced"
  },
  "decision_making": {
    "style": "quick/deliberate/mixed",
    "risk_tolerance": "low/medium/high",
    "information_needs": "minimal/moderate/thorough"
  },
  "patterns": ["pattern1", "pattern2", ...],
  "triggers_observed": ["trigger1", "trigger2", ...],
  "recommendations": ["recommendation1", ...]
}
